sampleRules: html, body, #root { width: var(--resume-page-width); min-height: var(--resume-page-height); margin: 0px; padding: 0px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; }
.resume-print-root { width: var(--resume-page-width); min-height: var(--resume-page-height); margin: 0px; overflow: visible; }
.resume-page { width: 794px !important; height: 1123px !important; margin: 0px !important; padding: 0px !important; box-shadow: none !important; transform: none !important; scale: 1 !important; }
